title: De-identified data fact sheet | Stats NZ

## De-identified data fact sheet
07 June 2017, 10:45am
This fact sheet summarises the benefits and risks of de-identified data and how it can be used for analysis.
- De-identified data – supporting analytical insights while maintaining privacy and confidentiality Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 404 KB
